Product Designer

Small Startup is a five-person team looking for a Product Designer to own our design system from the ground up, working directly with the two co-founders.

Responsibilities

Own and grow the design system used across our web and mobile apps. Run lightweight user research and turn it into shipped interface changes. Work closely with our two engineers on implementation details.

Requirements

3+ years of experience designing product interfaces. Comfortable working remote, with a few days on-site each month. Bachelor's degree not required if you have a strong portfolio.

Benefits

Competitive salary and early equity. Benefits include health coverage and flexible time off.
